description: Inline message override — the COLON form is rejected (§55.10 Level 1 / L12 Edge). req:"Name is needed" fires E-VALIDATOR-INLINE-COLON; the valid form is the paren form req("…").
rationale: §55.15 error table: E-VALIDATOR-INLINE-COLON — 'Inline message override uses the colon form req:"…" (not valid scrml); use the paren form req("…")'. Codes-only reject-path case.
